_comment: Trust policy for the Bedrock Agents classic service role (AmazonBedrockExecutionRoleForAgents_*). The role name MUST start with 'AmazonBedrockExecutionRoleForAgents_' - this prefix is enforced by the Bedrock service trust evaluation. The aws:SourceAccount + AWS:SourceArn conditions (note uppercase 'AWS:' for SourceArn - this matches the official Bedrock docs) are required to prevent confused-deputy attacks. Replace the wildcard agent/* with the specific agent ARN after the agent is created. Source: https://docs.aws.amazon.com/bedrock/latest/userguide/agents-permissions.html
_usage_note: Pair this trust policy with a separate permissions policy. Minimum required permissions: bedrock:InvokeModel on the specific foundation model ARN(s). Optional: s3:GetObject for OpenAPI schemas, bedrock:Retrieve for knowledge bases, bedrock:ApplyGuardrail, bedrock:InvokeAgent for multi-agent collaboration, bedrock:GetProvisionedModelThroughput for provisioned throughput models. See bedrock-agents-service-role-permissions.json (to create separately) or reference agents-permissions docs directly.
